rationale: Both catch the mtp-seed reproducibility loss under full cudagraphs and the redundant omni_pooler_payload_include_hidden assignment, and both flag the stale prefix-caching comment vs. new false value — but neither surfaces the Wallbreazzz NPU crash/fix thread or Sy0307's seed-yaml-removal benchmark confound, capping recall for both. Y engages more directly with the GT's central design objection (cudagraph_mode leaking into modeling, tied explicitly to the TODO and a call for a tracking issue) and grounds findings in explicit repo greps; X's yaml-header quote about a stale max_num_batched_tokens rationale isn't supported by the visible diff context, weakening its precision. Actionability is comparable, with Y's concrete test-addition asks slightly more concrete.
